string.text: All variables within acceptable ranges. Rest easy, Commander. I'm here.
In a rush? Don't worry. Groza is at your service.
Groza, can you check the temperature forecast?

Last night's temperature was 4 degrees Celsius, so that would be within the range of "Cold" for the Commander. Have you taken measures to keep yourself warm, Commander? The newly purchased scarf has already arrived in the Ops room. I will remind you to wear it when the temperature drops at night again.
Can you come with me, Groza?
Okay Groza, please head back to base. I will handle it from here.
It's an honor to be trusted by you, Commander. Please continue to rely on me in the future as well.
